---
name: Milestone 1 PDF scholarly workflow
title: "Milestone 1: PDF scholarly workflow"
labels: milestone, v1, pdf, annotation, citation
---

## Goal

Build one complete scholarly workflow before expanding file support.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Register PDF document.
- [ ] Add source metadata in CSL-compatible shape.
- [ ] Display PDF in reader.
- [ ] Define page mapping offset.
- [ ] Highlight selected text in one of ten colors.
- [ ] Add annotation note.
- [ ] Generate Chicago/SBL citation using mapped book page.
- [ ] Persist annotation and citation.
- [ ] Reopen document and recover exact annotation.

## Non-goals

- No broad AI synthesis.
- No cloud integrations.
- No Office conversion.
- No Universal Office code or assumptions.
